train.prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a Node.js app with multi-stage build
Set up Docker Compose for local development with hot reload
I need my containers to share a network so the API can talk to the database
The Docker image is 2GB, I need to make it smaller without breaking anything
I want the app to work exactly the same on every developer machine

Add pagination to the products API endpoint
